en.name: MSBS Grot 5.56x45 assault rifle
en.description: The MSBS Grot is a Polish modular assault rifle developed by FB "Łucznik" Radom. It is designed to be easily configurable for different roles, featuring quick-change barrels and ambidextrous controls.

en.name: STEEL Pegasus 5.56x45 Silencer
en.description: The STEEL Pegasus is a high-performance suppressor line manufactured by the Ukrainian company STEEL. Despite the brand name, the Pegasus series is primarily constructed from Grade 6 Titanium (BT6) rather than steel, chosen for its heat resistance and lightweight properties.
